'''Bravo Base''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] military facility located on the arctic world of [[Rhen Var/Legends|Rhen Var]]. During the first month of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the base fell victim to a large [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] invasion force, causing Rhen Var to fall to the Confederacy.

==Description==
Bravo Base was largely fenced in with multiple structures for use by its personnel, including many landing platforms for its complement of [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/Legends|gunships]] and [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/carrier/Legends|carriers]]. It was protected by at least one [[Turret/Legends|turret]]. North of the base lay a Republic outpost, and to the northeast an isolated Jedi Sanctuary and filtration plant.<ref name="Prima's Official Strategy Guide">[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref><ref name="Clone Wars 2002 video game">[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' video game]]</ref>

==History==
{{Quote|This is Bravo Base to Master Kenobi. According to our scouts, the Separatist army has landed a few klicks away from here. There is no way we can defend against that kind of firepower. We have to evacuate the planet.|Outpost Commander|<ref name="Clone Wars 2002 video game" />}}
Several weeks after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], the base came under heavy Separatist assault as part of their search for the [[Dark Reaper]]. While on patrol nearby in the system, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] picked up the invasion force arriving out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] on their sensors, prompting them to head toward the base and begin an [[Evacuation of Rhen Var|evacuation]].<ref name="Prima's Official Strategy Guide" /><ref name="Clone Wars 2002 video game" />

While Kenobi stayed on the ground to assist the commander, Skywalker took to the skies in a Republic gunship, rescuing a number of personnel from the nearby outpost and members of the Jedi Sanctuary, all the while providing cover for a [[Convoy/Legends|convoy]] of [[Republic Troop Transport/Legends|Republic Troop Transports]] and evacuation transports. Following the evacuation, the base was destroyed.<ref name="Prima's Official Strategy Guide" /><ref name="Clone Wars 2002 video game" />
